description:
To properly set the owner of /etc/issue.net, run the command: 
$ sudo chown root /etc/issue.net
rationale:
Display of a standardized and approved use notification before granting access to the operating system ensures privacy and security notification verbiage used is consistent with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, and guidance.
Proper ownership will ensure that only root user can modify the banner.
ocil_clause: /etc/issue.net does not have an owner of root
ocil:
To check the ownership of /etc/issue.net, run the command: 
$ ls -lL /etc/issue.net
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following owner: root
title: Verify ownership of System Login Banner for Remote Connections
